title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
